title: CadStruct RQ Recovery Source-Protocol Plan
strategy: Do not start training and do not reproduce external baselines. Use VecFormer/CADTransformer source only to align data, matching, scoring, and metric protocol before the next CadStruct validation run.
goal_completion_rule: If a stable CadStruct validation training is deliberately started later, mark the active goal complete. Current phase explicitly avoids training.

completed_this_pass.summary: Audited VecFormer/CADTransformer source-level protocols: log1p-length IoU, VecFormer sparse matcher cost normalization, mask threshold/object-normalization scoring, CADTransformer center/neighbor/offset feature path.
CadStruct assignment cost now matches VecFormer-style positive class cost plus per-term cost normalization, preventing class/focal/dice scale imbalance from corrupting Hungarian matching.
Deployment/admission score is upgraded to class probability × quality × mask objectness, matching VecFormer object-normalization behavior instead of admitting weak masks by class score alone.
Quality objective protocol bumped to v6 and records object_normalization_threshold, so old v5 checkpoints cannot silently mix the previous class×quality scoring protocol.
v6 structural-relation feature path was inspected; code supports it, but no full windowed v6 cache is currently present, so switching launch defaults now would fail rather than improve RQ.
evidence: reports/vlm/*v6* windowed cache not found in current listing

VecFormer: matching: class/BCE/Dice costs are normalized before weighting
score: class probability is multiplied by instance score and mask objectness
mask decoding: sigmoid(mask) > configured threshold; official default is 0.3
metric: PQ/SQ/RQ uses log(1+primitive_length) weighted IoU
CADTransformer: data: xy primitive centers, graph neighbors, node/rgb features
instance grouping reference: instance-center offset supervision
metric: line-index IoU weighted by log(1+length)

pending_tasks.title: Locate or build full v6 windowed cache
checks: Confirm train/val v6 windowed primitive cache exists before changing launch scripts.
Verify v6 lineage forbids semantic_id, instance_id, and page_instance_id as model inputs.
If absent, rebuild cache once; do not silently train v3/v4 while claiming v6 structural features.
pending_tasks.fix_plan: Data build task only; no model training in current phase.

pending_tasks.title: Run pre-training protocol smoke after v6 cache exists
checks: Launch script must explicitly use --input-feature-schema v6 and --require-target-schema-v6 only after v6 cache exists.
ABI report must show quality objective v6 and class×quality×mask-objectness score protocol.
First validation report must expose FN attribution, mask_objectness p10, admitted coverage, and calibrated RQ.
pending_tasks.fix_plan: Update launch script only after cache availability is confirmed.
